_comment: Curated research sources for fundamental context. Agents and scripts should prefer these over random web search.

general_equity.name: SEC EDGAR
general_equity.use_for: 10-K/10-Q filings, revenue mix, debt, segment breakdown

general_equity.name: Yahoo Finance
general_equity.use_for: Quick margins, growth, analyst consensus, sector/industry tags

general_equity.name: Macrotrends
general_equity.use_for: Long-run revenue, EBITDA, FCF history charts

halal_screening.name: AAOIFI / Shariah standards (reference)
halal_screening.use_for: Industry exclusion principles—not a substitute for scholar review

halal_screening.name: SPUS / HLAL holdings
halal_screening.use_for: Cross-check whether large-cap names pass common Sharia ETF screens

crypto.name: CoinGecko
crypto.use_for: Market cap rank, developer activity, category tags

crypto.name: Messari
crypto.use_for: Research profiles on major L1/L2 assets

why_now_signals: Revenue acceleration vs prior 4 quarters (filings or yfinance revenueGrowth)
Technical score inflection on 1W+1M (this repo's result_scores)
Sector RS vs SPY improving (performance_vs_spy.json in technical/result_scores)
